nodes.name: Brandish
nodes.desc: Brandish the Light, unleashing an arc that deals 105% damage.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Brandish
upgrades.desc: Brandish now pierces.

upgrades.name: Returning Light
upgrades.desc: Brandish's light returns dealing 52% damage.

upgrades.name: Sword of Mastery
upgrades.desc: While Healthy, Brandish deals 128% damage and travels 100% faster.

upgrades.name: Cross Strike
upgrades.desc: Brandish unleashes 2 additional arcs that deal 120% damage and apply Vulnerable.

nodes.name: Holy Bolt
nodes.desc: Throw a Holy hammer, dealing 126% damage.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Holy Bolt
upgrades.desc: Holy Bolt now applies Judgement.

upgrades.name: Ricocheting Bolt
upgrades.desc: Holy Bolt deals 135% damage and ricochets 3 times.

upgrades.name: Divine Bolt
upgrades.desc: Holy Bolt becomes a Disciple Skill, pierces, deals 120% damage, and applies Vulnerable.

upgrades.name: Storm Bolt
upgrades.desc: Holy Bolt becomes a Justice Skill dealing 315% damage and Stunning for 2 seconds.

nodes.name: Clash
nodes.desc: Strike an enemy with your weapon and shield, dealing 161% damage.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Clash
upgrades.desc: Whenever you cast Clash, gain Crusader's March for 6 seconds.

upgrades.name: Punishment
upgrades.desc: Emboldened during Crusader's March: 30% Retribution Chance, 3 Thorns, x20% Thorns damage.

upgrades.name: Skirmish
upgrades.desc: Clash becomes a Zealot Skill cleaving in an area for 155% damage.

upgrades.name: Seize Them
upgrades.desc: Resolve empowers Clash, x8% increased damage per stack. Every 3rd strike, enemies are Pulled in.

nodes.name: Advance
nodes.desc: Advance forward with your weapon, dealing 147% damage.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Advance
upgrades.desc: Casting Advance grants Unhindered for 2 seconds.

upgrades.name: Vanguard's Rush
upgrades.desc: Advance rushes into enemies, granting 1 Fervor on each strike.

upgrades.name: Wave Dash
upgrades.desc: Advance becomes a Juggernaut Skill, waves out dealing 136% damage.

upgrades.name: Flash of the Blade
upgrades.desc: Advance becomes a Disciple Skill with 10s cooldown, dealing 230% damage and applying Vulnerable.

passives.name: Discipline
passives.desc: Your Core Skills deal x18% increased damage.

passives.name: En Guarde
passives.desc: You gain +30% Armor and +15% Block Chance.

passives.name: Riposte
passives.desc: Blocking grants you 18% damage for 5 seconds.

passives.name: Parry
passives.desc: Blocking restores 3 Faith.

passives.name: Piety
passives.desc: Your Maximum Faith is increased by 15.

nodes.name: Zeal
nodes.desc: Strike with blinding speed, 112% damage followed by 3 strikes dealing 28% each.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Zeal
upgrades.desc: Zeal gains 2 additional strikes.

upgrades.name: Cull the Wicked
upgrades.desc: Zeal's cleave is larger, 2 additional strikes, x25% increased damage to Weakened enemies.

upgrades.name: Death or Glory
upgrades.desc: Zeal costs x10% Maximum Life instead of Faith and strikes around you in a circle.

upgrades.name: Zealot's Legacy
upgrades.desc: Zeal extends its assault, randomly seeking surrounding enemies and striking 4 additional times.

nodes.name: Blessed Shield
nodes.desc: Bless and hurl your shield dealing 302% damage ricocheting up to 3 times.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Blessed Shield
upgrades.desc: Blessed Shield deals 1% additional damage for each Armor on your shield.

upgrades.name: Shield of Justice
upgrades.desc: Blessed Shield detonates Judgement and ricochets 5 additional times.

upgrades.name: Shield of the Revenant
upgrades.desc: Blessed Shield boomerangs and pierces, dealing 270% damage.

upgrades.name: Shield of Retribution
upgrades.desc: Blessed Shield becomes a Juggernaut Skill, pulsing Thorns damage before bursting for 378%.

nodes.name: Blessed Hammer
nodes.desc: Throw a Blessed Hammer that spirals out dealing 161% damage.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Blessed Hammer
upgrades.desc: Blessed Hammer now hits enemies multiple times.

upgrades.name: Shattering Blow
upgrades.desc: Blessed Hammer deals 115% and shatters into 3 small explosions on impact.

upgrades.name: Disciple's Halo
upgrades.desc: Becomes a Disciple Skill orbiting around you.

upgrades.name: Mortar Combat
upgrades.desc: Blessed Hammer mortars 3 hammers to the ground, dealing 67% damage in an area.

nodes.name: Divine Lance
nodes.desc: Impale enemies with a heavenly lance, stabbing 2 times for 126% damage each.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Divine Lance
upgrades.desc: Divine Lance's damage increased by 30% of your Movement Speed bonus.

upgrades.name: Tip of the Spear
upgrades.desc: Divine Lance flurries, stabbing 2 additional times.

upgrades.name: Zealous Joust
upgrades.desc: Becomes a Zealot Skill, stabbing with 2 additional spears.

upgrades.name: Divine Javelin
upgrades.desc: Throw Divine Lance, dealing 90% damage to first enemy and bursting for 450%.

nodes.name: Shield Bash
nodes.desc: Charge at an enemy and bash in front of you, dealing 287% damage.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Shield Bash
upgrades.desc: Hits with Shield Bash count as Blocks.

upgrades.name: Breach
upgrades.desc: Shield Bash grants 10% Retribution Chance for 5 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.

upgrades.name: Smite
upgrades.desc: Shield Bash smites first enemy hit, dealing 287% damage and Stunning for 1 second.

upgrades.name: Lay Siege
upgrades.desc: Whenever you have Resolve, Shield Bash increases impact size by x50% and deals 246% damage.

passives.name: Longevity
passives.desc: You gain +30% Healing received.

passives.name: Anointing
passives.desc: Your allies Heal for +33% of the Healing you receive.

passives.name: Renewal
passives.desc: Blocking Fortifies you for 1.5% of your Maximum Life.

nodes.name: Fanaticism Aura
nodes.desc: Passive: Spending Faith grants +7% Attack Speed and +2.8% Crit Chance. Active: Weaken all Nearby enemies.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Fanaticism Aura
upgrades.desc: Fanaticism Aura's passive also grants 10% Maximum Resource.

upgrades.name: Rite of Vengeance
upgrades.desc: Passive increases Critical Strike Damage by x15%. Critical Strikes trigger Fanaticism's Passive.

upgrades.name: Rite of Humility
upgrades.desc: Active instead makes Nearby enemies Vulnerable for 4 seconds.

upgrades.name: Rite of Redemption
upgrades.desc: Weakened enemies who die within Fanaticism Aura's radius Heal you for 0.5% and Fortify for 1% Maximum Life.

nodes.name: Defiance Aura
nodes.desc: Passive: Grants you and allies 42% Armor and 42% All Resistances. Active: Become Unstoppable for 2 seconds.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Defiance Aura
upgrades.desc: Passive also grants 10% Maximum Life.

upgrades.name: Rite of Might
upgrades.desc: Increases your damage by x10% for 4 seconds whenever you gain Resolve.

upgrades.name: Rite of Prayer
upgrades.desc: Passive Heals you and allies for 2% Maximum Life per second.

upgrades.name: Rite of Thorns
upgrades.desc: Grants 3 Thorns and increases Thorns damage by x75%. Active releases a nova of Thorns damage.

nodes.name: Holy Light Aura
nodes.desc: Passive: You and allies deal 126% damage every 2 seconds to 3 random Nearby enemies. Active: Unleash 2 bolts of light dealing 448% Holy damage chaining to 4 enemies.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Holy Light Aura
upgrades.desc: Holy Light's passive now targets 2 additional enemies.

upgrades.name: Rite of Judgement
upgrades.desc: Holy Light's active instead Judges enemies and Cooldown is reduced per rank.

upgrades.name: Rite of Mercy
upgrades.desc: Holy Light's active chains 2 more times and Fortifies you and allies for 4% Maximum Life.

upgrades.name: Rite of Submission
upgrades.desc: Holy Light's active now Stuns enemies for 3 seconds and deals 182% damage.

passives.name: Resolute
passives.desc: Gaining a stack of Resolve Heals for 1.5% of your Maximum Life.

passives.name: Conviction
passives.desc: Gain +0.9% Attack Speed for each stack of Resolve, up to 9%.

passives.name: Attenuate
passives.desc: Gain +3% Resource Cost Reduction for every stack of Resolve, up to 15%.

passives.name: Courage
passives.desc: You gain 1 Resolve every 5 seconds an Elite enemy is Nearby.

passives.name: The Best Offense
passives.desc: You deal x18% increased damage while Fortified.

passives.name: Fortitude
passives.desc: Gain x18% Critical Strike Damage while Fortified.

passives.name: Thorns and Thistles
passives.desc: Gain Thorns and your total Thorns damage is increased by x45%.

passives.name: Repentance
passives.desc: Gain +18% Retribution chance.

nodes.name: Shield Charge
nodes.desc: Charge with your shield pushing enemies Back, granting 14% Damage Reduction and dealing 126% damage while Channeling.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Shield Charge
upgrades.desc: Shield Charge grants 1 Resolve whenever it hits an enemy.

upgrades.name: Relentless Charge
upgrades.desc: Shield Charge becomes a Core Skill costing 20 Faith plus 1 Faith per second.

upgrades.name: Virtuous Charge
upgrades.desc: Shield Charge becomes a Judicator Skill consuming Judgement on impact.

upgrades.name: Phalanx Charge
upgrades.desc: Shield Charge surges forward in a wave of energy Knocking enemies Back, dealing 157% damage.

nodes.name: Aegis
nodes.desc: Surround yourself with shields of the Light, Taunting Close enemies and gaining 100% Block Chance for 4 seconds.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Aegis
upgrades.desc: Casting Aegis grants Unstoppable for 4 seconds.

upgrades.name: Stay Resolute
upgrades.desc: Passive: Gaining or spending Resolve has 4% chance to trigger a free Aegis.

upgrades.name: Faith Is My Shield
upgrades.desc: Aegis now applies Judgement instead of Taunting enemies.

upgrades.name: Impunity
upgrades.desc: While Aegis is active, you gain 40% Thorns and Retribution Chance.

nodes.name: Falling Star
nodes.desc: Soar into the air and dive down, dealing 112% on liftoff and 336% damage on impact.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Falling Star
upgrades.desc: Killing a Vulnerable enemy reduces Falling Star cooldown by 1 second.

upgrades.name: Freefall
upgrades.desc: Falling Star has 1 additional charge.

upgrades.name: Fanatic Descent
upgrades.desc: Becomes a Zealot skill, dealing 560% damage on landing and Weakening enemies for 4 seconds.

upgrades.name: Faster Than Light
upgrades.desc: Falling Star cuts through the battlefield, creating a fissure dealing 180% damage before erupting for 60%.

nodes.name: Rally
nodes.desc: Rally forth, gaining 20% Movement Speed for 8 seconds and generating 30 Faith.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Rally
upgrades.desc: Rally increases Movement Speed by additional 10% and generates 5 additional Faith.

upgrades.name: Words of Sacrifice
upgrades.desc: Rally now costs 15% of your Maximum Life and can stack.

upgrades.name: Words of Inspiration
upgrades.desc: Rally spends all Charges, reducing all active Justice Skill Cooldowns by 3 seconds per Charge.

upgrades.name: Words of Rejuvenation
upgrades.desc: Rally generates 20 more Faith and gains 1 additional Charge.

passives.name: Crack in the Armor
passives.desc: You deal x18% increased damage to Vulnerable enemies.

passives.name: High Charity
passives.desc: You gain 12% Cooldown Reduction.

passives.name: Iron Sharpens Iron
passives.desc: You gain +18% Critical Strike Damage.

passives.name: Break the Line
passives.desc: You have +6% Critical Strike Chance and deal x15% increased Damage to Weakened enemies.

passives.name: Press the Advantage
passives.desc: Critically Striking grants you 9% Damage Reduction for 5 seconds.

passives.name: Heavyweight
passives.desc: You deal x18% Critical Strike Damage while Healthy.

passives.name: Pacify
passives.desc: You gain +45% increased Crowd Control duration.

passives.name: Dizzying Blow
passives.desc: You deal x21% increased damage to Crowd Controlled enemies.

passives.name: Righteousness
passives.desc: You deal x18% increased Holy and Fire damage.

passives.name: Leave Luck to Heaven
passives.desc: You gain 9% Lucky Hit Chance.

nodes.name: Purify
nodes.desc: Enshroud your enemies in the Light, Dazing them for 2 seconds.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Purify
upgrades.desc: Purify generates 10 Faith for each enemy affected.

upgrades.name: Sentence
upgrades.desc: Purify also Judges enemies and cooldown is reduced by 4 seconds.

upgrades.name: Surrender
upgrades.desc: Purify now Stuns for 4 seconds.

upgrades.name: Absolution
upgrades.desc: Purify deals 380% damage and Weakens enemies for 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Consecration
nodes.desc: Bathe in the Light for 6 seconds, Healing for 5.6% Maximum Life per second and dealing 105% damage per second.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Consecration
upgrades.desc: While inside Consecration, you and allies deal x15% additional damage.

upgrades.name: Hallowed Ground
upgrades.desc: Consecration's size is increased and lasts 4 seconds longer. Enemies within are Weakened.

upgrades.name: Bastion
upgrades.desc: Consecration Immobilizes enemies and can be cast anywhere.

upgrades.name: Sanctify
upgrades.desc: Consecration lasts 3 seconds increasing damage and Healing by 20% each second, then detonates.

nodes.name: Condemn
nodes.desc: Harness the Light and Pull enemies in after 1.5 seconds, briefly Stunning them and dealing 336% damage.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Condemn
upgrades.desc: While Casting Condemn, become Unhindered for 1.5 seconds.

upgrades.name: Gather the Guilty
upgrades.desc: Condemn now has 1 additional Charge and applies Vulnerable for 4 seconds.

upgrades.name: Atonement
upgrades.desc: Condemn Casts significantly faster instead of Pulling enemies in, dealing 420% damage.

upgrades.name: Shepard the Flock
upgrades.desc: Condemn's build up marks all enemies and drags them to your location after it Casts.

nodes.name: Spear of the Heavens
nodes.desc: Rain down 4 heavenly spears dealing 224% damage and Knocking Down for 1.5 seconds. After 1.5 seconds spears burst for 168%.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Spear of the Heavens
upgrades.desc: Consuming Judgement reduces Spear of the Heavens cooldown by 0.5 seconds.

upgrades.name: Pronouncement of Heaven
upgrades.desc: First spear gains permanent Judgement mark and remains on battlefield dealing 120% damage per second.

upgrades.name: Part the Heavens
upgrades.desc: Spear of the Heavens now drops 8 spears along the path toward your target.

upgrades.name: Fist of the Heavens
upgrades.desc: Becomes a Core Skill. Pure Holy energy crashes from the sky dealing 386% damage breaking into 5 projectiles.

passives.name: Shining Armor
passives.desc: Unique Weapon/Shield: x15% Damage. Unique Helmet/Chest/Pants: +15% Armor.

passives.name: Giant Slayer
passives.desc: You deal x15% increased damage to Elites and x24% to Healthy enemies.

passives.name: Sacred Arms
passives.desc: Two Handed: x15% Critical Strike Damage. One Handed and Shield: 15% chance to ignore damage.

passives.name: Master Craftwork
passives.desc: Your Armor is increased by 150% of your Shield's Block Chance.

passives.name: Shake It Off
passives.desc: You have 24% chance to become Unstoppable for 1 second after being hit by a Crowd Control Effect.

passives.name: Coat of Arms
passives.desc: Your damage is increased by 75% of your Armor Percent and 50% of your Block Chance.

passives.name: Path of the Penitent
passives.desc: Zealot Skills cost 100% more Faith, but grants all Skills +6% Resource Cost Reduction and x10% increased damage.

passives.name: Exaltation
passives.desc: During Arbiter your damage is increased by x85% and Wing Strikes strike 1 additional time.

passives.name: Judgement Day
passives.desc: Consuming Judgement increases your damage by x6% for 5 seconds, up to x90%. Judgement now spreads to nearby targets.

nodes.name: Heaven's Fury
nodes.desc: Grasp the Light, dealing 200% damage per second before releasing it to seek Nearby enemies dealing 126% damage per hit for 7 seconds.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Heaven's Fury
upgrades.desc: Heaven's Fury's light Judges enemies.

upgrades.name: Final Justice
upgrades.desc: Heaven's Fury can Cast anywhere, concentrating as it grows and Pulls enemies in before erupting for 1,260% damage.

upgrades.name: Walk With The Light
upgrades.desc: Heaven's Fury splits into 5 orbiting beams, dealing 78% damage each hit for 7 seconds.

upgrades.name: Triplicate
upgrades.desc: Heaven's Fury splits into 3 beams, dealing 36% damage each hit for 7 seconds.

nodes.name: Fortress
nodes.desc: Make your stand, becoming Immune for 3 seconds and create a defensive area for 13.5 seconds. Standing in Fortress grants you and allies 2 Resolve stacks every 0.5 seconds.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Fortress
upgrades.desc: While inside Fortress your Skills are free to Cast and you gain x4% damage per stack of Resolve.

upgrades.name: Entrench
upgrades.desc: While inside of Fortress your Life cannot be reduced below 1.

upgrades.name: Barricade
upgrades.desc: Killing enemies inside Fortress extends its duration by 0.5 seconds up to 20 seconds.

upgrades.name: Rampart of Thorns
upgrades.desc: Enemies inside Fortress are Slowed by 50% and take 500% of your Thorns damage per second.

nodes.name: Zenith
nodes.desc: Summon a divine sword that cleaves the battlefield for 630% damage. Casting Zenith again cuts through for 560% damage and Knocks Down enemies for 2 seconds.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Zenith
upgrades.desc: While Zenith is active, you are Unstoppable.

upgrades.name: Empyrean Edge
upgrades.desc: Zenith is now also a Mobility Skill that Dashes to enemies, Weakens them, gains 25% Critical Strike Chance.

upgrades.name: Sermon of Steel
upgrades.desc: Zenith unleashes your wrath and can be cast indefinitely for 4 seconds before starting its Cooldown.

upgrades.name: Sunder
upgrades.desc: Zenith sunders a rift, Knocking Down enemies and dealing 900% damage. After 1 second the rift detonates for 675%.

nodes.name: Arbiter of Justice
nodes.desc: Ascend to the heavens and crash upon the battlefield as an Arbiter for 20 seconds, dealing 840% damage upon landing.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Arbiter of Justice
upgrades.desc: Arbiter form's Wing Strikes recast time is reduced by 0.5 seconds.

upgrades.name: Divine Intervention
upgrades.desc: Ascends for 2 extra seconds and rains 10 additional Blessed Spears on landing.

upgrades.name: Reach of the Law
upgrades.desc: Arbiter's Wing Strikes now apply Judgement to enemies.

upgrades.name: Seraph's Wings
upgrades.desc: Arbiter form gains 100% Movement Speed, Wing Strikes deal x200% increased damage, makes Nearby enemies Vulnerable.

nodes.name: Zealot
nodes.desc: Casting Zealot Skills grants Fervor for 4 seconds. Critically Striking with these Skills echoes the attack for 47% of the damage per stack of Fervor.

nodes.name: Juggernaut
nodes.desc: Casting a Juggernaut Skill Consumes 8 stacks of Resolve, giving Juggernaut Skills x60% increased damage and 20% increased size for 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Judicator
nodes.desc: Your Basic Skills now apply Judgement. Each time you Judge an enemy, increase the damage they take from you by x8%, up to x80%.

nodes.name: Disciple
nodes.desc: Casting a Disciple Skill with a cooldown grants Arbiter for 4.5 seconds. Wing Strikes gain Disciple Skill benefits. In Arbiter form, Disciple Skills deal x50% increased damage.
